title: Dual Shapiro steps and fundamental transconductance in dc driven Bloch transistor
summary: We propose a superconducting circuit based on the Bloch transistor, a quantum device consisting of two small-capacitance Josephson junctions connected in series and having a small island in between. This device is driven by two dc electrical sources controlling Josephson oscillations of frequency $f_J = 2e\overline{V_J}/h$, related to the average voltage $\overline{V_J}$ on the transistor, and Bloch oscillations of frequency $f_B = \overline{I_B}/2e$, related to the average current $\overline{I_B}$ injected into the transistor island. Due to the Bloch transistor properties, these two types of oscillations can mutually phase lock, i.e., $f_J = f_B$. This leads to formation of current steps on the current-voltage curve at $\overline{I}_B = 2ef_J$, which are similar to the dual Shapiro steps appearing at current $\overline{I}=2ef$ under microwave irradiation of frequency $f$. Moreover, transconductance $\overline{I_B}/\overline{V_J}$ takes the fundamental value of $1/R_Q$, where $R_Q = h/4e^2$ is the resistance quantum. The obtained results pave the way to the alternative quantum standard of resistance, based on the superconducting circuit and operating without applying strong magnetic field.

AI.tldr: 本文提出基于Bloch晶体管的超导电路，利用约瑟夫森振荡与布洛赫振荡的相互锁相，在电流-电压曲线上形成电流阶梯，实现跨导为1/R_Q的量子化电阻标准，为无需强磁场的替代性电阻量子标准奠定基础。
AI.motivation: 探索一种无需强磁场的替代性量子电阻标准方案，基于超导电路实现电阻量子化。
AI.method: 采用Bloch晶体管（两个串联小电容约瑟夫森结+中间小岛），通过直流电驱动产生约瑟夫森振荡（f_J=2e\overline{V_J}/h）和布洛赫振荡（f_B=\overline{I_B}/2e），利用两者相互锁相（f_J=f_B）形成电流阶梯。
AI.result: 在电流-电压曲线上观察到电流阶梯（\overline{I}_B=2ef_J），跨导\overline{I_B}/\overline{V_J}达到基本值1/R_Q（R_Q=h/4e^2）。
AI.conclusion: 该方案为基于超导电路、无需强磁场的替代性量子电阻标准开辟了新途径。

title: Shear-stress-constrained superconductivity in Ruddlesden-Popper nickelates
summary: Ruddlesden-Popper nickelates exhibit superconductivity under pressure in bulk crystals and under epitaxial constraint in thin films, while remaining highly sensitive to sample quality, oxygen content, defects, and stress conditions. We propose that the metastable RP lattice becomes superconducting only when the local constrained deformation of the Ni-O framework falls within a bounded shear-strain window. This deformation controls octahedral rotations, the interlayer Ni-O-Ni bond angle, and coupling between Ni dz2 and dx2-y2 orbitals. This shear-stress-constrained superconductivity scenario unifies the understanding of the pressure threshold, reversibility, spatial inhomogeneity, pressure-medium dependence, film-substrate sensitivity, and reproducibility.

AI.tldr: 本文提出Ruddlesden-Popper镍氧化物超导电性仅当Ni-O框架的局域约束形变处于一个有限的剪切应变窗口内时才会出现，该剪切应力约束的超导统一了压力阈值、可逆性、空间不均匀性、压力介质依赖性、薄膜-衬底敏感性及可重复性等现象。
AI.motivation: RP镍氧化物在高压块材和外延薄膜中均表现出超导电性，但对样品质量、氧含量、缺陷和应力条件高度敏感，现有理论难以统一解释这些复杂的实验现象。
AI.method: 提出剪切应力约束超导电性（shear-stress-constrained superconductivity）的理论框架，认为仅当Ni-O框架的局域约束变形处于特定剪切应变窗口内时，超导才会出现。该变形调控八面体旋转、层间Ni-O-Ni键角以及Ni dz2与dx2-y2轨道的耦合。
AI.result: 该理论统一解释了压力阈值、可逆性、空间不均匀性、压力介质依赖性、薄膜-衬底敏感性及可重复性等关键实验现象。
AI.conclusion: 剪切应力约束是理解RP镍氧化物超导机制的关键，为解释其复杂的应变敏感性提供了统一的理论框架。

title: Atomically resolved intrinsic superconducting gap in (La,Pr)3Ni2O7 films
summary: Ruddlesden-Popper bilayer nickelates provide an emerging platform for studying high-temperature superconductivity, yet the superconducting pairing symmetry remains under debate. Here, we use atomic-resolution scanning tunnelling microscopy and spectroscopy to investigate superconducting 1.5-unit-cell (La,Pr)3Ni2O7 films grown on SrLaAlO4. A cryogenic ultrahigh-vacuum (UHV) sample transfer preserves an ordered sqrt(2) * sqrt(2) surface and yields reproducible U-shaped spectra with two gap scales of ~14 and ~20 meV and extended flat zero-conductance bottoms. By contrast, samples exposed for a longer time in UHV without cooling during transfer show V-shaped spectra despite retaining the surface reconstruction and a transport superconducting transition onset above 40 K. Wide-energy-range spectra indicate that oxygen loss can mix density-wave-related spectral weight. Our measurements provide an atomic-scale observation of the intrinsic nodeless superconducting gap in bilayer nickelate ultrathin films.

AI.tldr: 本文利用原子分辨率的扫描隧道显微镜/谱学技术，研究了Ruddlesden-Popper双层镍氧化物超薄膜的超导能隙，发现U形谱（无节点）和V形谱（有节点）取决于样品制备条件，揭示了本征无节点超导能隙。
AI.motivation: Ruddlesden-Popper双层镍氧化物为研究高温超导提供了新平台，但其超导配对对称性（有节点vs无节点）存在争议，需要原子尺度的直接观测来澄清。
AI.method: 采用原子分辨率扫描隧道显微镜/谱学技术，在超高压低温环境下研究1.5个单胞厚度的(La,Pr)3Ni2O7薄膜，通过控制样品传输条件对比U形和V形能隙谱。
AI.result: UHV低温转移样品呈现U形谱，有两个能隙尺度（~14和~20 meV）和展平的零电导平台；而长时间暴露样品虽保持表面重构且超导转变温度>40 K，却呈现V形谱；宽能谱显示氧缺失可混入密度波相关谱权重。
AI.conclusion: 该工作在原子尺度上观测到双层镍氧化物超薄膜的本征无节点超导能隙，表明其超导配对对称性应为无节点的s波或d波类型，而非节点型。

title: T-E formulation-based modeling of thin HTS shell magnetization
summary:
Numerical methods for modeling thin-film magnetization are primarily focused on computing the current density distribution. The highly nonlinear current-voltage characteristic of type-II superconductors significantly complicates the accurate computation of the electric field. The T-E formulation-based mixed finite element method, previously derived for flat superconducting films, enables the simultaneous, accurate determination of both variables. Another advantage of this method is that the computational domain is limited to the film itself: no meshing of the surrounding space is required. The thin-shell approximation reduces the problem to a two-dimensional one.
  This work extends the T-E formulation and numerical method to non-flat superconducting shells with a metal substrate. We validate the method with several test examples, including modeling the magnetization of a sphere. The method is then applied to a realistic model of a cylindrical magnetic dynamo pump, and the generated open-circuit voltage is computed.

AI.tldr: 本文扩展了T-E混合有限元方法，将其从平面超导薄膜推广到非平面超导壳层（含金属基底），通过多个测试验证方法有效性，并应用于圆柱形磁动力泵模型计算开路电压。
AI.motivation: 已有T-E混合有限元方法仅适用于平面超导薄膜，无法处理非平面超导壳层结构（如含金属基底的曲面超导体），需要对此进行方法扩展。
AI.method: 基于T-E公式的混合有限元方法，将计算域限制在超导壳层本身（无需对周围空间网格划分），并通过薄壳近似将问题降为二维，进一步扩展至非平面超导壳层并纳入金属基底效应。
AI.result: 通过多个测试算例（包括球体磁化建模）验证方法有效性，并成功应用于圆柱形磁动力泵模型，计算了其开路电压。
AI.conclusion: 该方法能够准确、高效地模拟非平面超导壳层的磁化行为，且计算域仅限于超导薄膜自身，无需额外网格划分，具有良好的实用性和扩展性。

title: A microcanonical approach to criticality in the mean-field $φ^4$ model: evidence of intrinsic microcanonical structure before the thermodynamic limit
summary: Collective critical behavior is often identified with thermodynamic nonanalyticities and divergences emerging only in the infinite-size limit. Here we adopt a complementary viewpoint: criticality is a structural property due to the rearrangement of the interactions among system's constituents that already exists at finite size and becomes singular only asymptotically. We show that the microcanonical entropy derivatives provide a natural finite-$N$ arena where such structure is encoded in intrinsic extremal/inflection morphologies, and that microcanonical inflection-point analysis (MIPA) turns these morphologies into a unique finite-size critical marker and a well-defined critical trajectory. Using the mean-field $φ^4$ model as a stringent benchmark, we reconstruct $β_N(\varepsilon)$ and $γ_N(\varepsilon)$ from microcanonical simulations, validate them against analytic results, and demonstrate that the MIPA trajectory converges to the exact thermodynamic critical point while simultaneously organizing the approach of other observables to their asymptotic behavior. Our results elevate finite-size criticality from a rounded remnant of the thermodynamic limit to a measurable and predictive object in its own right, with direct relevance to modern finite-system platforms and numerical studies.

AI.tldr: 本文提出微观正则系综拐点分析（MIPA）方法，证明有限尺寸系统中微正则熵导数的极值/拐点形态可作为临界性的内在结构标记，并通过平均场φ⁴模型验证该方法能收敛到精确热力学临界点，将有限尺寸临界性从热力学极限的圆滑残余提升为可测量、可预测的对象。
AI.motivation: 传统观点认为集体临界行为仅在无穷大系统中以热力学非解析性和发散性出现，本文旨在提供互补视角：临界性是系统组分间相互作用重排的结构性属性，在有限尺寸下已存在，只是渐进趋于奇异。
AI.method: 提出微正则拐点分析（MIPA）方法，利用微正则熵导数（β_N(ε)和γ_N(ε)）在有限N下的极值/拐点形态作为临界标记，构建明确的临界轨迹；以平均场φ⁴模型为基准进行验证。
AI.result: 通过微正则模拟重建β_N(ε)和γ_N(ε)，与解析结果一致；MIPA轨迹收敛到精确热力学临界点，同时有序化其他可观测量趋于渐近行为的方式。
AI.conclusion: 有限尺寸临界性不再是热力学极限的圆滑残余，而是本身可测量、可预测的实体，对现代有限尺寸平台和数值研究具有直接意义。

title: Fast contracted Clebsch--Gordan tensor products for equivariant graph neural networks
summary: We present an $\mathcal{O}(L^3)$ algorithm for evaluating contracted Clebsch--Gordan tensor products in $\mathrm{O}(3)$-equivariant machine learning potentials at fixed Canonical Polyadic (CP) rank. Mapping the angular integral to a structured Gauss--Legendre and Fourier tensor-product grid decouples the radial channel contractions from the angular transforms. The antisymmetric parity-odd Clebsch--Gordan channels, unreachable by the symmetric pointwise product on a scalar $S^2$ grid, are recovered through the surface-curl pairing $\hat r \cdot [\nabla_{S^2} A \times \nabla_{S^2} B]$, the spherical Poisson bracket, which supplies the $L=1$ angular momentum on the grid while preserving rotational equivariance. The construction extends to parity-aware equivariant message passing in atomic-cluster-expansion-style architectures and is verified by direct numerical quadrature. The full uncontracted Clebsch--Gordan tensor product remains subject to the $\mathcal{O}(L^4)$ output-size lower bound. A benchmark shows wall-clock scaling empirically as $L^2$ across the practical $l_{\max}$ range. For the on-site contraction this is pre-asymptotic, giving way to $L^3$ at large $l_{\max}$. For message passing it is structural and the runtime is memory-bandwidth bound on $L^2$-sized grid tensors.

AI.tldr: 提出一种 O(L³) 算法，用于在固定 CP 秩下计算 O(3) 等变机器学习势中的收缩 Clebsch-Gordan 张量积，通过将角积分映射到结构化 Gauss-Legendre 和 Fourier 张量积网格，并利用球面 Poisson 括号恢复奇宇称通道。
AI.motivation: 现有 O(3) 等变势中 Clebsch-Gordan 张量积的计算复杂度较高（O(L⁴)），需要更高效的算法以支持更大角动量截断。
AI.method: 将角积分映射到 Gauss-Legendre 和 Fourier 张量积网格，解耦径向收缩与角变换；通过球面 Poisson 括号（表面旋度配对）恢复奇宇称通道，保持旋转等变性。
AI.result: 算法复杂度 O(L³)，在实践 l_max 范围内观察到的墙钟时间呈 L² 缩放；对于原位收缩是预渐近的，在大 l_max 下过渡到 L³；消息传递受内存带宽限制，运行时间由 L² 规模的网格张量决定。
AI.conclusion: 该构造可扩展至宇称感知的等变消息传递，并通过数值求积验证，为更高效的等变机器学习势提供了实用方案。

title: TSAgent: An Agentic Workflow for Autonomous Transition State Search
summary: Identifying transition states (TSs) on potential energy surfaces is a central computational bottleneck in mechanistic studies of catalytic materials. A TS search is not a single calculation but a long-horizon, multi-step workflow of atomistic simulations with delayed, asynchronous feedback and heterogeneous failure modes that require a joint multimodal analysis of scalar convergence diagnostics and atomic geometries along the reaction path. To address this challenge, we propose TSAgent, an agentic workflow that automates TS search directly at the density functional theory (DFT) level of quantum chemical accuracy. TSAgent operates through a persistent plan-execute-analyze-replan loop, continuously adapting its strategy based on convergence diagnostics and geometric feedback without human intervention. We evaluate TSAgent on a diverse 100-example subset of the OC20NEB heterogeneous catalysis benchmark, where it successfully locates TSs with 83% accuracy. In a direct comparison against expert DFT practitioners on 10 held-out examples, TSAgent achieves a 70% success rate compared to a human-expert average of 73 +/- 12%. Finally, TSAgent independently reproduces Bronsted-Evans-Polanyi scaling relationships for NH3 dissociation on metal and single-atom alloy surfaces from a published heterogeneous catalysis study, demonstrating that its utility extends beyond curated benchmarks to real scientific investigations.

AI.tldr: 提出TSAgent，一种基于智能体工作流的自动化过渡态搜索方法，能在DFT精度下自主完成多步模拟，在催化基准测试中达到83%的准确率，性能接近人类专家。
AI.motivation: 当前催化材料机理研究中，过渡态搜索是计算瓶颈——它并非单次计算，而是需要多步原子模拟的长周期工作流，存在延迟反馈、异步反馈、异构失败模式等问题，且需要对标量收敛诊断和原子几何结构进行联合多模态分析。
AI.method: 提出TSAgent智能体工作流，采用持久的计划-执行-分析-再计划循环机制，基于收敛诊断和几何反馈持续自适应调整策略，无需人工干预，直接在DFT精度级别运行。
AI.result: 在OC20NEB基准的100个样例上达到83%准确率；在与人类DFT专家对比的10个测试样例上达70%成功率（人类专家平均73±12%）；独立复现了NH3在金属和单原子合金表面解离的BEP标度关系。
AI.conclusion: TSAgent证明了自动化智能体工作流在催化机理研究中可以达到接近人类专家的水平，且能超越基准测试，应用于真实的科学研究中。

title: Rongzai agent: A Large Language Model-Based Autonomous Assistant for Rietveld Refinement of Neutron Diffraction Data
summary: Neutron diffraction (ND) is an indispensable technique for determining atomic positions (especially light elements) and thus serves as a critical probe for revealing microscopic structures in materials science. However, traditional Rietveld refinement of ND data relies heavily on manual operation of specialized software, which is time-consuming, labor-intensive, and highly dependent on user expertise, severely hindering automated analysis. The automation of Rietveld refinement has long been a long-standing and challenging problem in crystallography. To address this challenge, this paper presents the Dr.Sai-Rongzai agent, an autonomous refinement assistant based on a large language model (LLM), a specialist knowledge base, and the GSAS-II refinement engine, achieving for the first time an intelligent refinement that integrates knowledge-driven decision-making. The agent accomplishes a fully automated workflow from natural language task parsing to autonomous decision-making, execution of refinement strategies, and report generation. Evaluation on five representative samples shows that the Rongzai agent achieves lower Rwp values than human specialists on three samples (2.88% vs. 4.42%, 5.06% vs. 5.40%, 7.60% vs. 9.00%), while on the other two samples its results are very close to those of the specialists. The agent is currently deployed at the China Spallation Neutron Source (CSNS) and is open for external user registration, providing an intelligent and user-friendly analytical tool for materials research. This work fully leverages the cutting-edge advantages of LLM, offers a new path to solve the long-standing problem of automated refinement, takes a key step toward intelligent and fully automated crystallographic analysis, and holds great potential to accelerate AI for Science discoveries in neutron-based materials characterization.

AI.tldr: 本文提出Dr.Sai-Rongzai智能体，基于大语言模型、专业知识库和GSAS-II精修引擎，首次实现了中子衍射Rietveld精修的全自动流程，在多个样本上取得优于人类专家的精修结果，目前已部署于中国散裂中子源。
AI.motivation: 传统的中子衍射Rietveld精修依赖人工操作专用软件，耗时费力且对用户经验要求高，严重阻碍了自动化分析。自动精修是晶体学中长期存在的难题，亟需智能化解决方案。
AI.method: 构建Dr.Sai-Rongzai智能体，集成大语言模型（LLM）进行自然语言任务解析与自主决策、专业知识库提供领域知识支撑、GSAS-II作为底层精修引擎，实现从任务解析到策略执行再到报告生成的全自动工作流。
AI.result: 在5个代表性样本上测试，Rongzai智能体在3个样本上Rwp值低于人类专家（2.88% vs 4.42%、5.06% vs 5.40%、7.60% vs 9.00%），另外2个样本结果与专家非常接近。
AI.conclusion: 该工作充分发挥了大语言模型的前沿优势，为长期存在的自动精修问题提供了新路径，是迈向智能全自动晶体学分析的关键一步，有望加速中子材料表征领域的AI for Science发现。

title: Quantum Monte Carlo fermion spectroscopy of a non-compact CP$^1$ model
summary: We study a model describing electrons coupled to anti-ferromagnetic spin fluctuations, and consider the situation where hedgehog defects in the order parameter field are suppressed. Without hedgehogs, the bosonic sector of the theory can be taken to realize the physics of the non-compact CP$^1$ theory with a deconfined U$(1)$ gauge field. After strongly coupling the boson to fermion spins, we simulate the single-particle spectral properties of a hedgehog-suppressed electron-boson model defined on a bilayer square lattice with Quantum Monte Carlo, and interpret the results in terms of an effective theory with fractionalized spinon and chargon excitations. As one of our main results we show that the electron gap on top of the half-filled insulator with gapless photon fluctuations closely resembles the mean-field dispersion of an electron in an anti-ferromagnetic spin background, even though the system fully preserves both the translation and spin rotation symmetry. Finally, we discuss potential implications of our results for the high-temperature superconductors.

AI.tldr: 本文研究的是抑制hedgehog缺陷的电子-反铁磁自旋涨落耦合模型，通过量子蒙特卡洛模拟揭示了在保持平移和自旋旋转对称性下，电子能隙行为与平均场反铁磁自旋背景中电子色散的高度相似性，并讨论了这对高温超导体的潜在意义。
AI.motivation: 研究电子与反铁磁自旋涨落耦合模型，特别是在抑制hedgehog缺陷的情况下，探索体系中的退禁闭U(1)规范场物理，以及这种效应对高温超导体的启示。
AI.method: 采用量子蒙特卡洛方法模拟了一个定义在双层正方晶格上的hedgehog抑制的电子-玻色子模型，通过将玻色子与费米子自旋强耦合来分析单粒子谱性质，并结合非紧致CP^1理论的有效描述进行解释。
AI.result: 在半填充绝缘体上，存在无质量光子涨落时，电子的能隙色散与平均场理论中电子在反铁磁自旋背景下的色散高度吻合，尽管系统完全保留了平移和自旋旋转对称性。
AI.conclusion: 该结果为高温超导体的理解提供了新的视角，表明即使在没有长程反铁磁序的情况下，电子仍可能感受到类似反铁磁自旋背景的能隙结构，这有助于解释高温超导体中赝能隙现象的起源。

title: Fermi Surface Geometry from Charge Fluctuations in Three-Dimensional Metals
comment: Main: 4.5 pages, 3 figures; Supplemental: 5 sections, 1 figure
summary: For three-dimensional non-interacting multi-band metals, we show that important information about the shape and the quantum geometry of Fermi surfaces is encoded in the subleading logarithmic term of bipartite charge fluctuations. This logarithmic term is related to the dimensionless $|\mathbf{q}|^3$-coefficient of the structure factor in momentum space, and both quantities can be expressed as Fermi surface integrals of the Fermi surface curvature tensor and the quantum metric tensor. When the real-space partition surface is a quadric (i.e., sphere or ellipsoid), the logarithmic coefficient satisfies a topological bound depending only on the Euler characteristic and the Chern number of the Fermi surface, illustrating a non-trivial interplay between topology and quantum topology in multi-band metals.

AI.tldr: 该论文揭示了多带金属中费米面的形状与量子几何信息可通过电荷涨落的次主导对数项编码，该对数项与结构因子的特定动量系数相关，并在特定分割面下受拓扑约束。
AI.motivation: 多带金属的费米面几何与拓扑信息难以直接探测，作者试图通过可测量的电荷涨落来提取这些信息。
AI.method: 通过理论分析，建立费米面曲率张量、量子度量张量与结构因子$|\mathbf{q}|^3$系数及电荷涨落对数项之间的数学联系，并研究球面/椭球面分割下的拓扑约束。
AI.result: 导出对数项与费米面量子几何的关系；发现当分割面为二次曲面时，对数系数满足仅依赖于费米面欧拉示性数和陈数的拓扑界。
AI.conclusion: 多带金属的电荷涨落对数项包含了费米面的几何与拓扑信息，体现了拓扑与量子拓扑之间的非平凡相互作用。

title: Matrix-Product Belief Propagation for continuous-state-space variables
summary: Computation of observables in discrete stochastic, possibly conditioned, dynamics over large sparse networks is at the basis of a myriad of applications. The Matrix-Product Belief Propagation method allows a semi-analytical estimation of such observables with a controlled error that depends on the size of the employed matrices, called bond size. Its computational cost is linear in the time horizon and the network size for a large family of models with discrete degrees of freedom. Here, a generalization of this method to models with continuous or mixed continuous/discrete degrees of freedom is presented, using a tunable expansion in a Hilbert function basis. The computational cost of the method is linear in the network size with a prefactor that depends on the basis size and the bond size. The method's efficacy is demonstrated by employing a Fourier basis for a mixed continuous/discrete representation of the Kinetic Ising dynamics with real-valued random couplings, where intermediate ``local fields'' are treated as continuous. The accuracy of the method is verified via comparison with Monte-Carlo simulations. For this model, we calculate time auto-correlations, time evolution of energy and magnetization, and finally we estimate the large deviation function of the magnetization at a given future time.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种将矩阵积信念传播方法推广到连续/混合自由度离散随机动力学系统的方法，通过希尔伯特基展开实现半解析计算，并在动力学伊辛模型上验证了其准确性和线性计算复杂度。
AI.motivation: 现有矩阵积信念传播方法仅适用于离散自由度的随机动力学系统，无法处理具有连续或混合连续/离散自由度的模型，而许多实际应用中存在此类需求。
AI.method: 在矩阵积信念传播框架中引入希尔伯特函数基的可调展开，将连续变量映射到基空间中进行半解析计算，计算复杂度在网络规模上呈线性，预因子依赖于基大小和键大小。
AI.result: 在具有实值随机耦合的动力学伊辛模型（混合连续/离散表示）上，采用傅里叶基进行实现，通过蒙特卡洛模拟验证了方法的准确性；计算了时间自相关、能量和磁化的时间演化，以及未来时刻磁化的大偏差函数。
AI.conclusion: 该方法成功将矩阵积信念传播推广到连续/混合自由度系统，计算复杂度保持线性，具有可控误差，为大规模稀疏网络上的随机动力学分析提供了新工具。

title: Unified definition of ferroelectricity
summary: Recent theoretical and experimental advances in quantum ferroelectrics suggest that ferroelectricity can also emerge in non-polar space group, highlighting the limitations of conventional polar space group criteria in identifying ferroelectric materials. Here, we introduce a unified definition based on switchable polarization differences between energetically equivalent states, which naturally encompasses conventional and quantum ferroelectrics. Guided by this principle, we implement a high-throughput screening strategy that systematically identifies both conventional and quantum ferroelectrics among experimentally synthesized materials. In particular, we identify a new type of quantum ferroelectric in which the quantized polarization arises from arbitrary ionic displacements, in contrast to previous quantum ferroelectrics (including both fractional and integer quantum ferroelectrics) where quantized polarization results from fractional or integer ionic displacements. Notably, we find that materials such as Ba3I6 and Cs2PdC2 exhibit low switching barriers and robust insulating behavior, highlighting their experimental viability. Our results reconcile conventional and quantum ferroelectrics, expand the accessible materials landscape, and provide a practical roadmap for discovering next-generation ferroelectrics with advanced switchable functionalities.

AI.tldr: 本文提出基于可切换极化差的统一铁电体定义，并通过高通量筛选发现了新型量子铁电体（任意离子位移产生量子化极化），拓展了铁电材料库。
AI.motivation: 传统极性空间群标准难以识别量子铁电体，需建立统一框架以涵盖常规和量子铁电体。
AI.method: 提出基于能量等价态间可切换极化差的统一定义，结合高通量筛选策略系统搜索实验合成材料。
AI.result: 识别出新型量子铁电体（任意离子位移产生量子化极化），发现Ba3I6和Cs2PdC2等材料具有低翻转势垒和良好绝缘性。
AI.conclusion: 该定义统一了常规与量子铁电体，扩大了材料发现范围，为下一代可切换铁电材料提供了实用路线图。

title: A quantum chemistry dataset containing ground-state and conical-intersection structures of 260k molecules
summary: Conical intersections play central roles in photoinduced reactions. However, comprehensive conical-intersection datasets that could advance our understanding of excited-state reaction processes remain scarce. To address this gap, we constructed a quantum chemistry dataset containing ground-state and conical-intersection structures of small molecules (up to ten heavy atoms: C, N, O, F). Ground-state geometries were optimized at the semi-empirical OM2 level, with single-point energies calculated at the OM2/MRCI level. Conical-intersection geometries and energies were also computed at the OM2/MRCI level. This dataset is designed to enable a deep integration of photochemistry with machine learning, bridging the gap between photochemical insight and data-driven approaches.

AI.tldr: 本文构建了一个包含小分子（最多10个重原子）基态和圆锥交叉结构及能量的量子化学数据集，旨在推动光化学与机器学习的深度融合。
AI.motivation: 圆锥交叉在光诱导反应中至关重要，但缺乏全面系统的圆锥交叉数据集，限制了人们对激发态反应过程的理解以及数据驱动方法在光化学中的应用。
AI.method: 在半经验OM2水平上优化基态几何结构，并在OM2/MRCI水平上计算单点能量；圆锥交叉的几何和能量同样在OM2/MRCI水平上计算得到。
AI.result: 构建了一个包含小分子（最多10个重原子：C, N, O, F）的基态和圆锥交叉结构及能量的量子化学数据集。
AI.conclusion: 该数据集有望弥合光化学洞察与数据驱动方法之间的差距，推动光化学与机器学习的深度整合。

title: Engineering topological flat bands in $Γ$-valley moiré systems with Ising-type SOC: twisted 1T-ZrS$_2$ and 1T-SnSe$_2$
summary: Twisted moiré superlattices hosting topological flat bands provide a platform to explore the interplay between topology and correlations. Here we investigate topological band structures in $Γ$-valley moiré systems based on 1T-ZrS$_2$ and 1T-SnSe$_2$. Using large-scale ab initio calculations and continuum modelling, we demonstrate that both materials exhibit an approximate spin-$U(1)$ symmetry and host isolated topological moiré valence bands, including quantum spin Hall and high spin Chern states. By constructing a hierarchy of $Γ$-valley moiré continuum models, we show that isolated moiré bands carry a trivial $C_3$ symmetry indicator when the low-energy physics is described by a single effective orbital and a single layer-hybridized branch, either bonding or antibonding. Topological bands therefore arise from inter-branch and/or inter-orbital coupling. Moreover, we determine interaction-driven phase diagrams using Hartree--Fock and exact diagonalization, finding various phases tunable by twist angle, interaction strength, and displacement field. We identify specific conditions under which fractional Chern insulators are favored. Together with previous work showing that the moiré conduction bands of 1T-ZrS$_2$ and 1T-SnSe$_2$ realize $M$-valley twisting and host quasi-one-dimensional physics, our results establish these systems as ideal platforms for strongly correlated moiré physics and provide a systematic framework for understanding topological band structures in $Γ$-valley moiré materials.

AI.tldr: 本文通过大规模第一性原理计算和连续模型，研究了基于1T-ZrS₂和1T-SnSe₂的Γ谷莫尔超晶格中的拓扑平带，发现两者具有近似的自旋-U(1)对称性并存在孤立的拓扑莫尔价带（包括量子自旋霍尔和高自旋陈数态），揭示了拓扑带源于分支间和/或轨道间耦合，并通过Hartree-Fock和精确对角化确定了相互作用驱动的相图，找到了分数量子陈绝缘体形成的特定条件。
AI.motivation: 探索扭曲莫尔超晶格中拓扑平带与关联效应的相互作用，特别是在Γ谷莫尔体系中实现强关联拓扑物理的平台。
AI.method: 大规模第一性原理计算、连续模型构建（Γ谷莫尔连续模型层次结构）、Hartree-Fock方法和精确对角化计算相图。
AI.result: 1) 两种材料均具有近似的自旋-U(1)对称性；2) 存在孤立的拓扑莫尔价带（量子自旋霍尔态和高自旋陈数态）；3) 单轨道、单层杂化分支下的C₃对称性指标平凡，拓扑带源于分支间/轨道间耦合；4) 通过扭角、相互作用强度和位移场可调控多种物相；5) 确定了有利于分数量子陈绝缘体的条件。
AI.conclusion: 1T-ZrS₂和1T-SnSe₂莫尔体系是实现强关联莫尔物理的理想平台，为理解Γ谷莫尔材料中的拓扑能带结构提供了系统框架。

title: Corner Charge Fluctuations in Higher Dimensions
summary: Measuring charge fluctuations within a subregion provides a powerful probe of quantum many-body systems. In two spatial dimensions, the shape dependence of the dimensionless corner contribution encodes universal data of quantum critical points and reveals observables of quantum geometry in various quantum phases. Here, we systematically extend this framework to higher dimensions. In three dimensions, we derive the universal angle dependence associated with trihedral corners of a generic parallelepiped and benchmark the predictions against Monte Carlo simulations of lattice models at the O(3) quantum critical point. We further identify a wedge-corner contribution that directly probes the quantum metric, supported by numerical results for a lattice Weyl semimetal model. More generally, we obtain angle functions for polyhedral corners of arbitrary parallelotopes in general dimensions and clarify the scaling of the corner contribution across phases of matter. While insulators and conformal critical points exhibit similar behavior across dimensions, metals display a characteristic even-odd dimensional effect.

AI.tldr: 本文系统地将电荷涨落的角贡献分析从二维推广到更高维度，推导了三维平行六面体三面角的普适角度依赖关系，并通过O(3)量子临界点的蒙特卡洛模拟验证了理论预测。研究进一步发现楔形角贡献可直接探测量子度量，并通过Weyl半金属模型的数值结果加以证实。文章还得到了任意维度平行多面体多面体角的角函数，并阐明了不同物质相中角贡献的标度行为：绝缘体和共形临界点在各维度行为相似，而金属呈现特征性的奇偶维数效应。
AI.motivation: 将二维空间中电荷涨落子区域分析的角贡献框架系统地推广到三维及更高维度，以揭示量子临界点的普适数据和量子几何可观测量。
AI.method: 推导三维平行六面体三面角的普适角度依赖关系，结合O(3)量子临界点晶格模型的蒙特卡洛模拟进行验证；识别楔形角贡献与量子度量关联，通过Weyl半金属模型数值验证；推广到任意维度平行多面体多面体角的角函数。
AI.result: 成功推导了三维三面角角度依赖关系并得到数值验证；发现楔形角贡献可直接探测量子度量；获得了任意维度平行多面体角函数的普遍形式；揭示了金属相中奇偶维数效应与绝缘体/共形临界点的维度行为差异。
AI.conclusion: 电荷涨落的角贡献框架可成功推广至高维，为研究量子临界点和物质相提供了普适工具，其中楔形角与量子度量的直接关联、金属的奇偶维数效应等发现具有重要物理意义。

title: Switchable Surface Linear Photogalvanic Effect in the Magnetic Weyl Semimetal Co3Sn2S2
summary: We investigate the linear photogalvanic effect (LPGE) on the surface of the magnetic Weyl semimetal Co3Sn2S2 using a Green's-function and diagrammatic formalism. While the LPGE vanishes in the centrosymmetric bulk, it is symmetry-allowed on the surface where inversion symmetry is broken. We show that unitary crystal symmetries on the surface produce characteristic sign reversals of the total photocurrent at certain polarization angles upon flipping the magnetization. We further find that the intrinsic contribution to the LPGE is strongly constrained by an antiunitary mirror symmetry, which forces several nonlinear response tensor elements to vanish. In contrast, the extrinsic contribution is not subject to these constraints and displays a large magnitude which, we argue, is due to the enhanced density of states associated with Fermi-arc surface states. The current exhibits an approximately linear temperature dependence and a low-frequency power-law scaling, |jy| proportional to omega^-2.2, with weak temperature dependence of the scaling exponent. Our results identify Co3Sn2S2 as a promising platform for experimentally accessing symmetry-controlled nonlinear transport in realistic systems and for applications in magnetically controlled optoelectronic devices.

AI.tldr: 本文利用格林函数和图论形式主义，研究了磁性Weyl半金属Co3Sn2S2表面的线性光致伏打效应（LPGE），发现表面由于反演对称性破缺允许LPGE存在，外禀贡献因费米弧表面态而显著增强，电流呈线性温度依赖和omega^-2.2的幂律标度。
AI.motivation: 探究磁性Weyl半金属Co3Sn2S2表面中对称性对非线性光电流的控制机制，特别是内禀和外禀贡献的差异化约束，以及费米弧表面态对光电流的增强作用。
AI.method: 采用格林函数和费曼图形式主义，结合对称性分析（包括幺正晶体对称性和反幺正镜面对称性），计算表面LPGE的响应张量。
AI.result: 1) 幺正对称性导致磁化翻转时特定偏振角下光电流的特征性符号反转；2) 反幺正镜面对称性强制内禀贡献的若干响应张量元为零，而外禀贡献不受此约束；3) 外禀贡献幅度显著较大，源于费米弧表面态增强的态密度；4) 电流呈近似线性温度依赖和|jy| ∝ omega^-2.2的低频幂律标度。
AI.conclusion: Co3Sn2S2是实现对称性可控非线性输运和磁控光电器件应用的理想平台。

title: Lévy-like flights and fractal geometry of finite point sets
summary: We study Lévy-like and truncated Lévy-like flights with step probability distribution of the form $r^{-1+ν}$ for negative, positive, and zero $ν$, focusing on the appearance of fractal geometry characteristics in the generated point sets. Forming ensembles of such point sets with fixed multiplicity, we develop simulation techniques leading to the desired value of correlation dimension in a vast continuous interval of scales. In particular, we demonstrate the possibility to produce ensembles of data sets with a low number of points with the needed properties. Furthermore, we show that the positive $ν$ distributions, apart from a region near the upper scale limit, show fractal behaviour that extends to infinitesimally low scales. As an example, we apply our findings to producing simulations relevant to the search for critical fluctuations, related to QCD critical endpoint, in heavy-ion collision experiments.

AI.tldr: 本文研究Lévy-like和truncated Lévy-like飞行的步概率分布（形式为$r^{-1+ν}$），针对ν为负、正和零的情况，重点分析生成点集中分形几何特征的出现。通过构建固定重数的点集系综，开发了在连续尺度区间内实现所需关联维数的模拟技术，并展示了生成具有所需属性的低点数数据集聚类的可能性。此外，发现正ν分布除了在上限尺度附近外，在无限低尺度上也表现出分形行为。最后，将研究成果应用于重离子碰撞实验中与QCD临界端点相关的临界涨落搜索模拟。
AI.motivation: 研究Lévy飞行的分形特征，特别是ν为不同值时点集的分形几何性质，并解决在连续尺度区间内生成具有特定关联维数数据集的模拟技术问题，最终应用于高能物理中QCD临界端点的搜索。
AI.method: 采用Lévy-like和truncated Lévy-like飞行模型，步概率分布为$r^{-1+ν}$（ν取正、负、零）；通过系综模拟技术，固定点集重数，在连续尺度区间内调控关联维数。
AI.result: 成功开发了在广泛连续尺度区间内实现所需关联维数的模拟技术；证明了正ν分布除上限尺度附近外在无限低尺度上表现出分形行为；展示了生成低点数数据集系综的可行性。
AI.conclusion: 该研究为生成具有可控分形特征的数据集提供了有效方法，并在重离子碰撞实验中QCD临界涨落搜索方面具有重要应用价值。

title: High-Pressure Crystal Structure Database
summary: High-pressure research is a productive route to new structures and emergent properties. However, crucial high-pressure structural information remains highly fragmented across individual publications and heterogeneous computational repositories. This fragmentation creates a major bottleneck for data-driven materials design. To bridge this gap, we introduce the High-Pressure Crystal Structure Database (HPCSD), a traceable, pressure-resolved repository that integrates experimental and theoretical high-pressure structures. HPCSD is constructed from two complementary data streams: elemental high-pressure phases and a searchable configuration space of stable and metastable phases generated via CALYPSO crystal structure prediction. To ensure rigorous comparability, all retained structures underwent re-optimization under a unified density functional theory (DFT) framework , with continuous enthalpy curves systematically generated specifically for the elemental phases across their stability fields. The initial release encompasses 77,346 consistently evaluated structural entries spanning 89 elements. An analysis reveals that pressure-induced polymorphism is ubiquitous and exhibits pronounced family-dependent trends. Structural diversity is strongly influenced by an element's electronic adaptability , with the greatest structural complexity emerging at intermediate rather than highest pressures. By providing standardized, reusable, and rigorously evaluated high-pressure structural data, HPCSD establishes a robust infrastructure to accelerate experimental phase identification, facilitate cross-study thermodynamic comparisons, and support the development of machine-learning interatomic potentials and generative models for high-pressure systems.

AI.tldr: 本文介绍了高压晶体结构数据库（HPCSD），一个整合实验与理论高压结构数据的可追溯、压力可解析的存储库。初始版本涵盖89种元素的77,346条结构条目，所有结构均在统一DFT框架下重新优化。分析表明压力诱导多晶型现象普遍存在且具有族依赖性，结构多样性受元素电子适应性影响，最大结构复杂性出现在中等压力而非最高压力。该数据库旨在加速实验相鉴定、促进热力学比较及支持机器学习势函数和生成模型开发。
AI.motivation: 高压结构信息高度分散在各类出版物和异构计算库中，碎片化严重，成为数据驱动材料设计的重大瓶颈。亟需一个标准化、可追踪的高压结构数据库来弥合这一差距。
AI.method: 从两条互补数据流构建HPCSD：1) 元素高压相实验数据；2) 通过CALYPSO晶体结构预测生成的稳定和亚稳相搜索空间。所有保留结构在统一DFT框架下重新优化，并为元素相在其稳定场范围内系统地生成连续焓曲线。
AI.result: 初始版本包含77,346条条目，覆盖89种元素。压力诱导多晶型普遍存在且呈现显著的族依赖性趋势；结构多样性受元素电子适应性强烈影响；最大结构复杂性出现在中等压力而非最高压力下。
AI.conclusion: HPCSD通过提供标准化、可重用且经严格评估的高压结构数据，建立了稳健的基础设施，可加速实验相鉴定、促进跨研究热力学比较，并支持高压系统机器学习势函数和生成模型的开发。

title: All-atomistic Transferable Neural Potentials for Protein Solvation
summary: Implicit solvent models are widely used to decrease the number of solvent degrees of freedom and enable the calculation of solvation energetics without water molecules. However, its accuracy often falls short compared to explicit models. Recent advancements in neural potentials have shown promise in drug discovery, but transferability remains a persistent challenge. Here, we introduce the Protein Hydration Neural Network (PHNN), an implicit solvent model that extends analytical continuum solvation by learning transferable corrections to model parameters instead of applying post hoc adjustments to final energies. The model is explicitly designed to maximize data efficiency by leveraging physical priors embedded in the data. We demonstrate that PHNN improves accuracy relative to traditional analytical methods and maintains predictive accuracy on out-of-domain protein systems.

AI.tldr: 本文提出蛋白质水合神经网络（PHNN），一种通过学习可转移的参数校正来提高隐式溶剂模型精度的新方法，在保持预测准确性的同时具有数据高效性。
AI.motivation: 隐式溶剂模型虽广泛应用但精度不如显式模型，而神经势函数虽具潜力但存在可转移性挑战。
AI.method: PHNN通过学习对模型参数的可转移校正（而非对最终能量进行后验调整），并利用数据中的物理先验以最大化数据效率。
AI.result: PHNN相比传统解析方法提高了准确性，并在域外蛋白质体系上保持预测性能。
AI.conclusion: PHNN为隐式溶剂模型提供了一种兼顾精度与泛化能力的新范式。

title: Circularity in Perovskite-Based Tandem Photovoltaics for Terawatt-Scale Deployment
summary: As photovoltaics (PVs) scale from one to multiple terawatts over the next decade, ensuring sustainable deployment is urgently required. Crystalline silicon (c-Si) PVs, the current industry standard, will generate an estimated 160 million tonnes of waste by 2050, and there remains complex technoeconomic challenges associated with their recycling. Metal-halide perovskite (MHP)-based tandem PVs not only promise higher power conversion efficiencies than single-junction c-Si devices, but also offer intrinsic advantages for circularity, including simpler device architectures, low-temperature processing, and more accessible materials recovery routes. At this pivotal juncture when perovskite PVs begin to enter the market, this review examines the critical circularity challenges that must be addressed: substitution of scarce raw materials, scalable recycling protocols, cost-effective stack delamination, safe lead sequestration, and policy frameworks to encourage circularity across the device lifecycle with effective incentives. By integrating the materials, technoeconomic and policy dimensions that go beyond conventional lifecycle assessments, we outline actionable strategies to co-optimize device performance and sustainability. This review aims to guide researchers, policymakers, and industry stakeholders in steering perovskite-based tandem PVs towards a circular and responsible commercialization pathway within the global clean-energy transition.

AI.tldr: 本文综述了金属卤化物钙钛矿（MHP）叠层光伏在商业化初期面临的循环性挑战，包括材料替代、回收工艺、铅安全封存及政策框架，并提出了协同优化性能与可持续性的策略，旨在引导其向循环经济方向发展。
AI.motivation: 随着晶硅光伏到2050年将产生约1.6亿吨废弃物，回收面临技术经济挑战，而钙钛矿叠层光伏虽效率更高且具有循环性优势，但尚未系统解决其商业化过程中的循环性问题，亟需从材料、技术经济及政策多维度进行审视。
AI.method: 采用综述方法，整合材料科学、技术经济分析与政策视角，超越传统生命周期评估，系统审视钙钛矿叠层光伏在稀缺原材料替代、可规模化回收工艺、经济有效的堆叠分层、铅安全封存及政策激励等关键循环性挑战。
AI.result: 指出了钙钛矿光伏进入市场必须解决的五大循环性挑战：稀缺原材料替代、可规模化回收方案、低成本分层技术、铅安全封存以及鼓励全生命周期循环的政策框架。
AI.conclusion: 通过材料、技术经济与政策维度的整合，提出了协同优化器件性能与可持续性的行动策略，引导钙钛矿叠层光伏在全球清洁能源转型中走向循环且负责任商业化路径。

title: Generalized Model Fractional Quantum Hall States on Lattices
summary: Model wave functions are essential for studying fractional quantum Hall phases, yet lattice model states have so far been limited to bosonic systems with on-site interactions. In this work, by combining analytical and numerical methods, we systematically construct lattice model states for the Laughlin, Moore--Read, and general $\mathbb{Z}_k$ Read--Rezayi series. Our lattice-specific states are characterized by their idealized energy and entanglement features and are distinguished from their continuum counterparts by a modified clustering behavior. Our theory advances the understanding of the stability of topologically ordered phases and illustrates the organizing principles of the conformal Hilbert space on lattices. Practically, this work paves the way for further studying lattice-specific excitations and offers a constructive route for engineering topological orders within density interactions, with potential immediate implications for cold-atom and synthetic flat-band platforms.

AI.tldr: 本文通过解析与数值方法，系统构建了Laughlin、Moore-Read及一般Z_k Read-Rezayi系列的晶格模型态，这些态具有理想化的能量和纠缠特征，并展现出与连续对应态不同的修正簇聚行为，为理解拓扑序稳定性及在晶格上构造拓扑序提供了新途径。
AI.motivation: 模型波函数对研究分数量子霍尔相至关重要，但现有的晶格模型态仅限于具有在位相互作用的玻色子系统。作者希望突破这一限制，构建更广泛的晶格模型态。
AI.method: 结合解析和数值方法，系统构建了Laughlin、Moore-Read以及一般Z_k Read-Rezayi系列的晶格模型态。
AI.result: 成功构建了这些晶格特定态，它们具有理想化的能量和纠缠特征，但与连续对应态相比表现出不同的簇聚行为。
AI.conclusion: 该理论增进了对拓扑有序相稳定性的理解，阐明了晶格上共形希尔伯特空间的组织原理，为研究晶格特定激发和工程化拓扑序提供了建设性途径，对冷原子及合成平带平台有潜在应用价值。

title: Operator ordering as an emergent geometric background in Dirac systems with spatially varying mass
comment: 13 pages, 1 figure. To appear in Physics Letters A
summary: We investigate the spectral consequences of the uniquely determined Hermitian ordering of the Dirac Hamiltonian with spatially varying mass. In contrast to the nonrelativistic case, where continuous families of admissible prescriptions exist, the relativistic Dirac operator admits a single consistent ordering compatible with probability-current conservation. This requirement generates an additional logarithmic-gradient term proportional to the spatial variation of the mass profile. We show that this contribution modifies the effective kinetic operator and induces a universal deformation of the spectral quantization condition. In compact geometry, an explicit analytic computation reveals a mode-dependent second-order spectral shift that becomes strongly enhanced near the mass-inversion threshold. These results demonstrate that the consistent relativistic ordering of the Dirac operator leads to observable modifications of discrete spectra in spatially inhomogeneous scalar backgrounds.

AI.tldr: 本文研究Dirac Hamiltonian在空间变化质量下的唯一厄米排序，发现该排序产生对数梯度项，导致谱量化条件的普适变性，并在紧凑几何中产生可观测的谱移。
AI.motivation: 探讨相对论性Dirac算子在空间变化质量背景下，唯一确定的厄米排序如何影响其谱性质，弥补非相对论情形中多种排序选择但在相对论情形中唯一性带来的物理后果。
AI.method: 从概率流守恒推导出Dirac哈密顿量的唯一一致排序，识别出对数梯度项；在紧凑几何中进行显式解析计算，分析谱移行为。
AI.result: Dirac算子的唯一排序产生对数梯度项，修改了有效动能算子；在紧凑几何中观察到模式依赖的二阶谱移，且在质量反转阈值附近显著增强。
AI.conclusion: 一致相对论性排序导致Dirac算子在空间不均匀标量背景中产生可观测的离散谱修正，具有物理可检验性。

title: N-Graphdiyne as a Tunable Platform for Stabilizing Light Metals toward High-Capacity Reversible Hydrogen Storage
summary: Hydrogen (H2) is a promising carbon-neutral energy carrier. However, its deployment is limited by the lack of lightweight, reversible storage media that operate under practical conditions. Here, we establish nitrogen-doped graphdiyne (N-GDY) as a programmable two-dimensional platform for stabilizing dispersed light-metal dopants and enabling high-capacity physisorption of molecular H2. The computational package involves density functional theory (DFT) combined with ab initio molecular dynamics (AIMD) and Langmuir-based statistical thermodynamic modeling. The results revealed that N-sites of N-GDY bind up to five Li, Na, K, and Ca atoms per primitive cell with binding energies of -2.27, -1.57, -1.80, and -2.13 eV, respectively, exceeding their respective bulk cohesive energies. AIMD simulations at 400 K further confirm the structural robustness of the decorated frameworks and the absence of metal aggregation. The polarised metal centres activate reversible H2 adsorption through electrostatic and dispersion interactions, with average adsorption energies falling within the optimal window (-0.15 to -0.35 eV per H2). Sequential adsorption analysis reveals uptake of up to 25 H2 molecules per primitive cell, achieving intrinsic gravimetric capacities of 13.08, 10.82, 9.23, and 9.15 wt% for Li-, Na-, K-, and Ca-functionalized systems, respectively. Thermodynamic analysis indicates favorable adsorption-desorption behavior under near-ambient conditions, with Li- and Ca-functionalized systems exceeding the 6.5 wt% U.S. Department of Energy's ultimate system-level target when considering intrinsic material capacity. These results identify N-GDY as a chemically tunable scaffold for dispersing lightweight metals and provide a mechanistic design strategy for achieving high-capacity, reversible hydrogen storage in porous two-dimensional materials.

AI.tldr: 本文通过第一性原理计算，证明氮掺杂石墨炔（N-GDY）可作为分散轻金属（Li、Na、K、Ca）的平台，实现高容量可逆氢物理吸附，其中Li和Ca功能化系统的储氢容量分别达到13.08和9.15 wt%，超过美国能源部6.5 wt%的系统级目标。
AI.motivation: 氢能作为碳中和能源载体具有前景，但缺乏轻质、可逆且能在实际条件下工作的储氢介质，现有材料难以兼顾高容量与可逆性。因此，需要探索新型多孔二维材料平台以实现高性能储氢。
AI.method: 采用密度泛函理论（DFT）、从头算分子动力学（AIMD）和基于Langmuir的统计热力学建模相结合的计算方法，系统研究N-GDY负载轻金属后的储氢性能。
AI.result: N-GDY的N位点可稳定结合Li、Na、K、Ca金属原子（结合能分别为-2.27、-1.57、-1.80、-2.13 eV），AIMD模拟在400 K下验证了结构稳定性且无金属团聚；金属功能化后H2吸附能处于最优窗口（-0.15至-0.35 eV/H2）；Li、Na、K、Ca功能化系统分别可实现25个H2分子吸附，容量达13.08、10.82、9.23、9.15 wt%；Li和Ca系统超过美国能源部6.5 wt%的最终系统级目标。
AI.conclusion: N-GDY是一种化学可调的二维多孔平台，可有效分散轻金属并实现高容量可逆储氢，为新型多孔二维材料储氢提供了机理设计策略。

title: On the effective rank of canonical polyadic decomposition of electron repulsion integrals
summary: In this paper, we study the effective rank of the canonical polyadic decomposition applied to the electron repulsion integrals, ubiquitous in quantum chemistry. We demonstrate, both mathematically and numerically, that in general the effective rank of this decomposition cannot grow linearly as a function of the system size. Moreover, we derive a lower bound for the effective rank in the form $\propto N_{\mathrm{AO}}^2/\log_2^7 N_{\mathrm{AO}}$, where $N_{\mathrm{AO}}$ is the number of atomic orbitals in the molecule, under mild conditions imposed on the decomposition threshold $ε$. As a result, while a subquadratic growth of the CPD rank is not excluded, a linear relationship between the rank and $N_{\mathrm{AO}}$ cannot hold universally. The implications of these findings for the use of the canonical polyadic format to represent electron repulsion integrals in quantum chemistry are analyzed.

AI.tldr: 本文研究了量子化学中电子排斥积分的典型多级分解的有效秩，证明其有效秩通常不能随系统规模线性增长，并推导出下限为 ~ N_AO²/log₂⁷ N_AO，表明线性关系不能普遍成立。
AI.motivation: 探究典型多级分解（CPD）在表示电子排斥积分（ERI）时的有效秩增长规律，验证是否可以实现线性可扩展性。
AI.method: 结合数学推导与数值实验，在分解阈值ε的温和条件下，推导有效秩的下界，并分析其与原子轨道数N_AO的标度关系。
AI.result: 有效秩不能随系统大小线性增长；下界为 ∝ N_AO²/log₂⁷ N_AO；亚二次增长未被排除，但线性关系不能普遍成立。
AI.conclusion: CPD格式在表示ERI时存在固有可扩展性限制，不能实现线性秩增长，这对量子化学中的张量分解应用具有重要启示。

title: A Neural-Network Framework to Learn History-Dependent Constitutive Laws and Identifiability of Internal Variables
summary: The identification of constitutive laws is ubiquitous in engineering: in modeling of materials where experimental data are fitted to mathematical models or learning surrogate models to beat the FE\textsuperscript{2} computational cost of multiscale numerical simulations. However, these models of constitutive laws, unless equipped with a potential formulation, are not necessarily consistent with (a) the second law of thermodynamics; (b) stability of the material under extreme applied strain; and (c) the mathematical theory underpinning the existence of solutions of the governing equation. In this work, we present a causal and energetic formulation, consistent with aforementioned properties, of learning a history-dependent constitutive law. This characterization of the class of internal variables sheds light on the equivalence class of equivalent surrogate models for the constitutive law. We show that the internal variables that are learned from the data are unique up to a linear transform. The framework is deployed to learn the Taylor-averaged response of a polycrystalline magnesium unit cell. We achieve 2\% relative error in the prediction of the Taylor-averaged response.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种符合热力学第二定律、材料稳定性和数学适定性的因果能量框架，用于学习历史依赖的本构律。研究表明，学习到的内部变量在数据中唯一确定（仅相差线性变换），并在多晶镁单元胞的泰勒平均响应预测中实现了2%的相对误差。
AI.motivation: 现有本构律模型若不配备势能公式，往往违背：(a)热力学第二定律；(b)极端应变下的材料稳定性；(c)控制方程解存在的数学理论。需要一种能保证这些一致性的学习方法。
AI.method: 提出因果能量框架（causal and energetic formulation），从数据中学习历史依赖的本构律，刻画内部变量类并揭示等价类关系，证明学习到的内部变量在线性变换下唯一。
AI.result: 在多晶镁单元胞的泰勒平均响应预测中，实现了2%的相对误差。
AI.conclusion: 该因果能量框架保证了本构律与热力学、稳定性和数学理论的兼容性，内部变量的唯一性（线性变换意义下）为替代模型提供了理论保障，且预测精度良好。

title: Observation of Switchable Chiral Magnons in an Altermagnet
comment: 7 pages, 3 figures. Accepted for publication in Phys. Rev. Lett. Supplemental Material is included only in the PRL version
summary: Chiral magnons, the quanta of handed spin waves, transport spin angular momentum without energy loss due to Joule heating. The recently discovered altermagnets were proposed to host chiral magnons arising from a non-relativistic exchange mechanism, similar to that in ferromagnets but without net magnetization, offering a stray-field-free platform for efficient magnon spin-current manipulation. In this work, we directly observed chiral magnons in the altermagnetic prototype MnTe using polarized inelastic neutron scattering. Furthermore, the magnon chirality was found to be reversibly switched by magnetic-field control, establishing a robust foundation for functional altermagnetic magnonics.

AI.tldr: 该论文在交错磁体原型材料MnTe中利用极化非弹性中子散射直接观测到了手性磁子，并实现了磁场对手性磁子的可逆调控，为功能性交错磁子学奠定了基础。
AI.motivation: 交错磁体理论预测可产生手性磁子，但缺乏实验验证。作者希望填补这一空白，并探索磁场调控手性磁子的可能性。
AI.method: 使用极化非弹性中子散射技术，在交错磁体原型材料MnTe中直接观测手性磁子。
AI.result: 成功在MnTe中观测到手性磁子，并发现可通过外加磁场实现手性的可逆切换。
AI.conclusion: 该工作为无杂散场、高效的自旋流操控提供了新型平台，奠定了功能性交错磁子学的实验基础。

title: Spin Hall effect in electronic Lévy glasses: Enhanced spin current generation in the superdiffusive regime
comment: 9 pages, 5 figures, 68 references. This work is a follow-up to arXiv:2302.02197 and arXiv:2405.10066
summary: In spintronics, both electronic charge and spin are used to process and store information. Generation, manipulation, and detection of spin currents are essential for the development of next-generation spintronic technologies. Here, we investigate the spin Hall effect in electronic Lévy glasses composed of graphene ribbons with randomly distributed circular regions of high spin-orbit coupling. These systems exhibit two transport regimes that can be tuned by adjusting the Fermi energy. The superdiffusive regime is characterized by low Fermi energy, low resistivity, and low magnetoresistivity, resulting in a long spin diffusion length, in contrast to the diffusive regime. Employing the Landauer-Büttiker approach in conjunction with numerically exact tight-binding simulations, we compute spin-resolved transmission coefficients to assess the spin Hall current and the spin Hall angle as functions of Fermi energy, spin-orbit coupling strength, and on-site electrostatic potential. Our findings reveal that, in the superdiffusive regime, a low charge current can be converted into a large spin Hall current, whereas in the diffusive regime, the same charge current generates a modest spin Hall current. Moreover, we observe that the spin Hall angle can reach 30% in the superdiffusive regime, whereas in the diffusive regime it is only 5%. These results demonstrate that electronic Lévy glasses provide a versatile platform for controlling spin transport and optimizing the spin Hall effect for spintronic applications.

AI.tldr: 本文研究了由石墨烯 ribbons 和随机分布的高自旋轨道耦合圆形区域组成的电子 Lévy 玻璃中的自旋霍尔效应，发现超扩散区可实现高自旋霍尔角（30%），为自旋电子学应用提供了可调控平台。
AI.motivation: 自旋电子学中，自旋电流的产生、操控和检测对下一代技术至关重要，现有体系对自旋霍尔效应的调控能力有限，亟需新的平台优化自旋输运。
AI.method: 采用 Landauer-Büttiker 方法与数值精确的紧束缚模拟，计算自旋分辨传输系数，分析自旋霍尔电流和自旋霍尔角随费米能、自旋轨道耦合强度及静电势的变化。
AI.result: 超扩散区中低电荷电流可转化为大自旋霍尔电流，自旋霍尔角达30%；扩散区仅5%。超扩散区具有低费米能、低电阻率和低磁电阻率，自旋扩散长度长。
AI.conclusion: 电子 Lévy 玻璃是可调控自旋输运和优化自旋霍尔效应的多功能平台，有望推动自旋电子学技术发展。

title: Generalized Suzuki-Chin Factorization in Bosonic Path Integral Molecular Dynamics
summary: Modern implementations of path integral molecular dynamics (PIMD) simulations of distinguishable particles frequently make use of high order factorization schemes for the Boltzmann operator to expedite convergence of equilibrium averages. Among these methods is the generalized Suzuki-Chin factorization (GSF), which is accurate up to fourth order in the imaginary-time step. In this work, we show that the GSF decomposition of the Boltzmann operator is applicable to bosonic PIMD, and results in an improved convergence of estimators. In particular, we show that the recently developed quadratic scaling bosonic PIMD need not change when using the GSF. The GSF scheme is implemented as a re-weighting factor for observables, without affecting the sampling generated by the standard, second-order, primitive factorization. We study the effect of this factorization for bosons in a harmonic trap and a sinusoidal potential. We also assess the effectiveness of GSF in calculating fermionic expectation values for harmonically-trapped atoms. In all these cases, we find that the GSF speeds up convergence with the Trotter number by a factor of $\sim 2-4$ across a wide temperature range, at only a modest computational cost.

AI.tldr: 本文证明广义铃木-钦分解（GSF）可用于玻色子路径积分分子动力学（PIMD）模拟，通过重加权因子在不改变采样的情况下加速收敛，在谐振势阱、正弦势和费米子计算中，GSF将Trotter数收敛速度提升约2-4倍，计算成本仅略有增加。
AI.motivation: 将高阶玻尔兹曼算符分解（GSF）从可区分粒子PIMD推广到玻色子PIMD，以提高平衡平均值的收敛效率。
AI.method: 采用GSF分解作为可观测量计算的重加权因子，不改变标准二阶原始因子化生成的采样；在谐振势阱、正弦势和费米子系统中验证性能。
AI.result: 在谐振势阱、正弦势和费米子系统中，GSF在宽温度范围内将Trotter数收敛速度提升约2-4倍，计算成本仅适度增加。
AI.conclusion: GSF分解可有效推广至玻色子PIMD，显著加速收敛，且不影响二次标度玻色子PIMD的采样过程，是一种高效且成本适中的改进方案。

title: Functional and Density-Driven Errors in Density Functional Theory: Quantum Monte Carlo Benchmarks for Solids
summary: We introduce a systematic analysis of density functional approximation errors in solids by separating functional-driven from density-driven contributions using quantum Monte Carlo densities of silicon, sodium chloride, and copper as reference. Typically, functional errors dominate, but we identify important exceptions where density-driven errors exceed functional errors by factors of 2-3, notably for SOGGA11 and τ-HCTH in the semiconductor and the insulator. Material dependence is striking: 63% of functionals show error cancellation in silicon versus 18% in copper, and only five functionals surpass LDA accuracy for metallic copper even with exact densities. For silicon and sodium chloride, GILL or BECKE exchange combined with PBE, PW91, or P86 correlation achieves near-exact xc energies on QMC densities, while copper requires specialized functionals like PBEsol or PBELYP. High-quality densities consistently reduce density-driven errors across all systems. Historical analysis reveals that 1990s GGA functionals outperform many modern meta-GGAs, contradicting expectations of systematic improvement along Jacob's ladder. These results provide practical guidance for functional selection and highlight implications for machine learning potential development, where material-dependent error cancellation may compromise transferability.

AI.tldr: 本文通过量子蒙特卡罗密度作为参考，系统分析了固体中密度泛函近似误差，发现虽然泛函误差通常占主导，但在某些功能中密度驱动误差可超过泛函误差2-3倍。材料依赖性显著：硅中63%的泛函有误差抵消，铜中仅为18%。仅5种泛函即使在精确密度下也能超越LDA对金属铜的精度。历史分析表明1990年代的GGA泛函优于许多现代meta-GGA，质疑了Jacob阶梯的系统性改进预期。
AI.motivation: 现有研究缺乏对固体中泛函误差与密度驱动误差的系统分离分析，且不同材料的误差特性差异尚未被充分理解。
AI.method: 使用量子蒙特卡罗密度作为参考密度，将密度泛函近似误差分离为泛函驱动误差和密度驱动误差，对硅、氯化钠和铜三种固体进行系统分析。
AI.result: 泛函驱动误差通常主导，但SOGGA11和τ-HCTH在半导体和绝缘体中密度驱动误差超过泛函误差2-3倍。硅中63%的泛函存在误差抵消，铜中仅18%。仅5种泛函在精确密度下超越LDA对铜的精度。GILL或BECKE交换结合PBE/PW91/P86关联在硅和氯化钠上达到近精确xc能量；铜需PBEsol或PBELYP等专用泛函。高质量密度始终降低密度驱动误差。1990年代GGA优于许多现代meta-GGA。
AI.conclusion: 该研究为泛函选择提供了实用指导，并揭示了材料依赖性误差抵消可能损害机器学习势函数的可迁移性。

title: A Flexible, Automated, and Basis-Set Insensitive Domain-Based Charge-Transfer Decomposition for Correlated Wavefunctions and its Application to Inter- and Intramolecular Cases
summary: We present a flexible, automated, and basis-set insensitive domain-based charge-transfer (CT) decomposition framework that can be combined with any CI-type excited-state wavefunction. Our approach is not based on excited-state densities and allows the excited-state character to be dissected into local and domain-based CT excitations and measures the individual contributions to each excited state. To guarantee a broad applicability, we introduce two domain-accumulation strategies to translate hole-particle substitutions to domain-domain excitations: a strict domain partitioning and a weighted approach suitable for small molecules and a large number of domains. The performance of both schemes is assessed for inter- and intramolecular CT excitations and various basis sets using EOM-CCSD and its simplified counterpart EOM-pCCD+S. Most importantly, the CT character is, to a large extent, basis-set independent, and both domain-accumulation schemes give consistent results. Overall, our framework provides a robust CT analysis and a domain resolution of the excitation character for a variety of computational setups and excited-state models.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种灵活、自动化且对基组不敏感的基于域的电荷转移（CT）分解框架，可结合任意CI型激发态波函数，通过两种域累积策略将空穴-粒子替换转化为域-域激发，实现了对激发态特征的局域和CT分解，且对基组和域划分方案不敏感。
AI.motivation: 现有的电荷转移分析方法存在基组敏感性、依赖激发态密度或适用范围有限等问题，亟待开发一种更通用、基组不敏感且可适用于多种激发态模型的CT分解框架。
AI.method: 提出基于域的CT分解框架，引入两种域累积策略（严格域划分和加权方法），将空穴-粒子替换转化为域-域激发，不依赖于激发态密度，可与EOM-CCSD、EOM-pCCD+S等多种CI型激发态波函数结合使用。
AI.result: 在分子间和分子内CT激发测试中，两种域累积策略结果一致；CT特性在很大程度上对基组不敏感；框架在多种计算设置和激发态模型下均表现出鲁棒性。
AI.conclusion: 该框架提供了鲁棒的CT分析和激发态特征的域分辨率，具有广泛的适用性和基组不敏感性，适用于多种计算设置和激发态模型。

title: Carrier-density dependence of magnetotransport in correlated Dirac semimetal CaIrO$_3$
summary: We report the carrier density dependence of the magnetotransport property in the correlated Dirac semimetal CaIrO$_3$. In the dilute carrier density region ($n_{\rm H}$ $\sim 2.2 \times 10^{16} \,$$\rm{cm}^{-3}$) at $2 \, \mathrm{K}$, the mobility exceeds $1.0 \times 10^{5} \,$$\rm{cm}^{2}/\rm{Vs}$ at $2 \, \mathrm{K}$, and the transverse magnetoresistance (MR) reaches $2,000 \,$\% at $12 \, \mathrm{T}$. The analysis of quantum oscillations and Hall conductivity shows that the Fermi velocity is nearly independent of the cross-sectional area of the Fermi surface, or equivalently the carrier density, supporting a $k$-linear dispersion of the Dirac node. The field dependence of magnetoresistivity is nearly $B$-linear in the moderate carrier density region ($n_\mathrm{H} \geq 4 \times 10^{16}\,$cm$^{-3}$), but scales with $B^α$ ($α> 2$) in the lower carrier density region. The variation of magnetoresistivity is likely affected by the enhanced long-range Coulomb interaction in the quantum limit, where Dirac electrons are subject to the magnetic confinement.

AI.tldr: 本文报道了关联狄拉克半金属CaIrO₃中载流子密度依赖的磁输运性质。在低载流子密度区域（~2.2×10¹⁶ cm⁻³），2K下迁移率超过1.0×10⁵ cm²/Vs，横向磁电阻在12T下达到2000%。量子振荡和Hall电导分析表明费米速度几乎与费米面截面积（即载流子密度）无关，支持狄拉克节点的k-线性色散。磁电阻率在中等载流子密度区域呈近B-线性关系，但在更低载流子密度区域呈B^α（α>2）标度关系，这种变化可能受到量子极限下增强的长程库仑相互作用的影响。
AI.motivation: 探究关联狄拉克半金属CaIrO₃中载流子密度如何影响其磁输运性质，特别是验证狄拉克节点的k-线性色散关系，并理解在量子极限下电子-电子相互作用对磁电阻行为的影响。
AI.method: 通过调控载流子密度，测量不同载流子浓度下的磁输运性质（迁移率、磁电阻、量子振荡、Hall电导），分析费米速度与载流子密度的关系，以及磁电阻率随磁场变化的标度行为。
AI.result: 低载流子密度下迁移率极高（>1.0×10⁵ cm²/Vs），磁电阻达到2000%（12T）；费米速度几乎不依赖载流子密度，支持狄拉克节点的k-线性色散；磁电阻率在中等载流子密度呈B-线性，低载流子密度呈B^α（α>2）超线性标度。
AI.conclusion: CaIrO₃的狄拉克节点确实具有k-线性色散，低载流子密度下磁电阻的超线性标度行为很可能源于量子极限下增强的长程库仑相互作用对狄拉克电子的影响。

authors: Willdauany C. de Freitas da Silva
title: The thermopower properties of interacting systems
summary: The quest for efficient devices has fueled research in thermoelectric materials. In these materials, the goal is to maximize the Figure of Merit $ZT$. One of the components of this quantity is the Seebeck coefficient, which measures the voltage generated in response to a temperature gradient. Recent studies have revealed that strong electronic correlations can enhance the Seebeck coefficient, leading to anomalous behavior near half-filling. However, the impact of interactions beyond the on-site Hubbard remains mostly unexplored. In this work, we investigate the Seebeck coefficient considering attractive interactions, nearest-neighbor interactions, sublattice potentials and electron-phonon coupling. We find that additional interaction scales can enhance the Seebeck coefficient, while also leading to multiple anomalous changes of sign as a function of doping. We also show that the anomalous behavior is connected to a gap opening in the ground state. Moreover, electron-phonon coupling also lead to a Seebeck anomaly, even without on-site repulsion. We connect these changes of sign in the Seebeck coefficient with a restructuring of the Fermi surface and a change in its topology, an effect commonly seen in cuprates.

AI.tldr: 本文研究了非局域相互作用（如吸引相互作用、近邻相互作用、子格势和电子-声子耦合）对热电材料中Seebeck系数的影响，发现这些相互作用可增强Seebeck系数并导致多次反常符号变化，这些变化与费米面拓扑重构相关。
AI.motivation: 尽管已有研究指出强电子关联可增强Seebeck系数（尤其在近半填充处），但超出Hubbard onsite相互作用的效应尚未被系统探索，因此本文旨在填补这一空白。
AI.method: 通过考虑吸引相互作用、近邻相互作用、子格势和电子-声子耦合，系统地研究了这些额外相互作用尺度对Seebeck系数的影响，并分析了其与基态能隙、费米面拓扑变化的关系。
AI.result: 额外相互作用尺度可增强Seebeck系数，并导致多次反常符号变化；这种反常行为与基态能隙打开相关；电子-声子耦合本身（即使无on-site排斥）也可引发Seebeck反常；符号变化的根源在于费米面重构和拓扑转变，该效应常见于铜氧化物中。
AI.conclusion: 非局域相互作用是调控Seebeck系数的重要机制，其引起的费米面拓扑变化是Seebeck系数反常符号变化的关键物理图像，为优化热电材料性能提供了新思路。

title: Engineering Delocalization in Graphene Nanoribbons via Quasiperiodic Edges and Electronic Interactions
summary: We investigate localization effects in zigzag graphene nanoribbons with quasiperiodic Fibonacci-type edge extensions, accounting for electron-electron interactions. We employ a tight-binding model that includes first- and third-nearest-neighbor hoppings, in which electronic interactions are treated within a self-consistent mean-field Hubbard approximation. Charge transport properties are calculated using the Landauer-Büttiker formalism. Our results reveal that the combination of quasiperiodic geometry and electronic interactions gives rise to nontrivial transport phenomena. Specifically, the system exhibits three transport regimes: in the non-interacting case, we observe geometric localization. For weak interactions, the system shows a conductive regime with transmission oscillations, whose multiplicity increases with the Fibonacci generation order. In this regime, delocalization emerges from the interplay between geometry and interaction-induced correlations. Finally, for strong interactions, repulsion dominates, and the system returns to a localized state. Our results demonstrate that quasiperiodic edge engineering, combined with electronic interaction control, offers a promising path to modulate transport in graphene nanoribbons.

AI.tldr: 本文研究了具有准周期Fibonacci型边缘延伸的锯齿形石墨烯纳米带的局域化效应，发现几何结构与电子相互作用的结合会产生三种不同的输运 regime：无相互作用时的几何局域化、弱相互作用时的导电态（传输振荡随Fibonacci阶数增加），以及强相互作用时的重新局域化。
AI.motivation: 探究准周期边缘工程与电子-电子相互作用如何协同调控石墨烯纳米带的电荷输运性质，为调制石墨烯纳米带输运特性提供新路径。
AI.method: 采用包含第一和第三近邻跃迁的紧束缚模型，电子相互作用通过自洽平均场Hubbard近似处理，电荷输运性质使用Landauer-Büttiker形式计算。
AI.result: 发现三种输运 regime：非相互作用下的几何局域化；弱相互作用下的导电态（传输振荡，多重性随Fibonacci阶数增加）；强相互作用下的重新局域化。
AI.conclusion: 准周期边缘工程结合电子相互作用控制，为调制石墨烯纳米带输运性质提供了有前景的途径。

title: Full-Dimensional Reactive Potential Energy Surfaces for OCS$^+$ $\rightarrow$ CO+S$^+$ Dissociation: Ground and Excited States
summary: Full-dimensional reactive potential energy surfaces (PESs) for the OCS$^+$ cation are constructed to describe S$^+$ loss in the electronic ground state and seven low-lying electronically excited states. High-level \textit{ab initio} reference energies were computed at the MRCI+Q/aug-cc-pVTZ level and were used to generate PESs employing reproducing kernel Hilbert space representations (RKHS). The PESs accurately reproduce the measured dissociation limits to CO(X$^1Σ^+$)+S$^+$ in different electronic states. The topology of the PESs reveals multiple linear and T-shaped minima, pronounced angular anisotropy, and state-crossing manifolds. Exploratory quasi-classical trajectory simulations on selected PESs confirm numerical stability and energy conservation, illustrating the suitability of the surfaces for dynamical applications. The present work represents the most comprehensive characterization to date of the lowest PESs of OCS$^+$ and provides a reliable foundation for future studies of the photodissociation of OCS$^+$ and the chem-ionization dynamics of OCS.

AI.tldr: 本文构建了OCS⁺阳离子的全维反应势能面（PES），覆盖电子基态和七个低激发态，基于MRCI+Q/aug-cc-pVTZ水平的参考能，采用RKHS表示方法。PES准确再现了实验解离极限，揭示了多种线性/T型极小、角各向异性和态交叉流形。准经典轨迹模拟验证了数值稳定性和能量守恒，为未来光解离和化学电离动力学研究提供了可靠基础。
AI.motivation: OCS⁺阳离子的光解离和化学电离动力学研究需要高精度、全维的反应势能面，但现有工作缺乏对最低电子态势能面的系统表征。
AI.method: 1. 在MRCI+Q/aug-cc-pVTZ水平计算高精度从头算参考能量；2. 利用再生核希尔伯特空间（RKHS）表示方法构建势能面；3. 通过准经典轨迹模拟测试势能面的动力学适用性。
AI.result: 1. 构建了电子基态和七个低激发态的全维PES；2. 准确再现了CO(X¹Σ⁺)+S⁺的实验解离极限；3. 揭示了多重线性/T型极小、显著角各向异性和态交叉流形；4. 准经典轨迹模拟验证了数值稳定性和能量守恒。
AI.conclusion: 这是迄今为止对OCS⁺最低势能面最全面的表征，为后续OCS⁺光解离和OCS化学电离动力学研究提供了可靠基础。

title: Machine-learning-identified two-dimensional van der Waals multiferroics for four-state nonvolatile memory
summary: Two-dimensional (2D) van der Waals (vdW) multiferroics offer an attractive platform for four-state nonvolatile memory by combining switchable ferroelectric polarization and magnetization within a single material system. However, their development is hindered by the scarcity of synthesizable candidates and the lack of non-destructive readout schemes. Here, we combine machine-learning screening with first-principles calculations to explore the 2D vdW ABC$_2$X$_6$ family and identify a set of high-confidence multiferroic candidates. Among them, AuCrP$_2$S$_6$ monolayer emerges as a representative system with a ferromagnetic ground state, a sizable out-of-plane polarization of 7.46 pC/m, and a moderate ferroelectric switching barrier of $\sim$130 meV/f.u. Moreover, the nonlinear optical response mediated by the bulk photovoltaic effect (BPVE) in AuCrP$_2$S$_6$ provides a dual-channel probe of the ferroic orders, in which the polarization direction governs the photocurrent sign while the magnetic order selects the spin channel via robust exchange splitting. This intrinsic coupling enables the non-destructive readout of four logic states within a single atomic layer, thereby providing a practical blueprint for next-generation multistate optoelectronic memory.

AI.tldr: 本文通过机器学习筛选结合第一性原理计算，在2D vdW ABC₂X₆家族中发现了以AuCrP₂S₆为代表的多铁材料，该材料兼具铁电性和铁磁性，并利用体光伏效应实现非破坏性四态读出，为下一代多态光电子存储提供了蓝图。
AI.motivation: 二维范德华多铁材料是实现四态非易失性存储的理想平台，但其发展受限于可合成候选材料稀缺以及缺乏非破坏性读出方案，亟需新的材料发现和读出机制。
AI.method: 采用机器学习筛选结合第一性原理计算，系统探索2D vdW ABC₂X₆家族，筛选出高置信度的多铁候选材料，并通过体光伏效应对铁电和铁磁序进行双通道探测。
AI.result: AuCrP₂S₆单层具有铁磁基态、面外极化7.46 pC/m以及约130 meV/f.u.的铁电翻转势垒；体光伏效应可实现极化方向控制光电流符号、磁序通过交换劈裂选择自旋通道，从而实现四个逻辑态的非破坏性读出。
AI.conclusion: 本文证明了在单原子层内实现四态非破坏性读出的可行性，为下一代多态光电子存储器件提供了实用的设计蓝图。

title: Ultrafast decoupling of quasiparticles and spin fluctuations in superconducting cuprates
comment: 24 pages , 5 figure (main text) and 14 pages (supplemental material)
summary: Understanding how quasiparticles are generated following a rapid quench of superconductivity in high-Tc cuprates is a key unresolved problem in nonequilibrium superconductivity. Here we resolve these processes in optimally doped YBCO [YBa2Cu3Oy(y=6.94, Tc=92 K)] using broadband (0.16 -4.1 eV, ca. 100 fs) and nearly single-cycle (6 fs) transient reflectivity spectroscopy. We show that within a few femtosecond, enhanced electron-electron Umklapp scattering dominates, signaling a transient modulation of long-range Coulomb interactions on the eV scale. This regime is followed by a rapid suppression of the scattering rate of the mid-infrared absorption associated with carriers dressed by spin fluctuations. We attribute this observation to an ultrafast decoupling of quasiparticles from the spin-fluctuation background, occurring on a 90 fs timescale set by the inverse optical gap. These findings reveal the correlated many-body dynamics underlying quasiparticle generation in cuprates and provide further clues for unconventional pairing mechanism.

AI.tldr: 本文利用宽带超快反射光谱技术，揭示了高温超导体YBa₂Cu₃O_y在超导猝灭后，准粒子在飞秒时间尺度上通过电子-电子Umklapp散射和与自旋涨落退耦合的生成动力学过程。
AI.motivation: 理解高温铜氧化物超导体中超导快速猝灭后准粒子的产生机制，这是非平衡超导领域一个尚未解决的关键问题。
AI.method: 采用宽带（0.16–4.1 eV，约100 fs）和近单周期（6 fs）瞬态反射光谱技术，研究最佳掺杂YBCO（YBa₂Cu₃O_y, y=6.94, Tc=92 K）的超快动力学。
AI.result: 发现：1）飞秒内增强的电子-电子Umklapp散射主导，标志着eV尺度长程库仑相互作用的瞬态调制；2）随后快速抑制与自旋涨落修饰载流子相关的中红外吸收散射率，准粒子与自旋涨落背景在约90 fs时间尺度上退耦合。
AI.conclusion: 揭示了铜氧化物中准粒子产生背后的关联多体动力学，为非常规配对机制提供了进一步线索。

title: Open Quantum Theory of Shot Noise in Dissipative Chiral Transport
summary: We develop an open quantum theory for shot-noise dynamics in dissipative chiral transport. By mapping a system under consideration onto a quantum circuit, we show that current noise is governed by two competing factors: the average occupancy distribution and particle-number fluctuations. With energy fully relaxed, shot noise is strongly suppressed, reflecting the stacking of electrons into lower energy states due to dissipation. This process quenches the partition noise from partially occupied levels, and finally isolates the residual noise protected by strong $U(1)$ symmetry. Moreover, selectively heating the source against the bath uncovers the underlying competition between the noise contributions from the occupancy distribution and those from the particle-number fluctuations. It triggers a sign reversal in inter-channel correlation noise, a signature masked by seemingly identical single-channel thermal noises. We propose an inversion scheme to experimentally reconstruct the hidden occupancy distribution directly from measurable noise cumulants.

AI.tldr: 本文发展了耗散手性输运中散粒噪声动力学的开放量子理论，揭示了电流噪声由占据数分布和粒子数涨落两个竞争因素决定，并提出了从可测量的噪声累积量中重建隐藏占据数分布的反演方案。
AI.motivation: 理解耗散环境下手性输运的散粒噪声动力学机制，揭示能量完全弛豫下噪声被抑制的物理根源，以及实验上无法直接观测的占据数分布信息。
AI.method: 将系统映射到量子电路，发展开放量子理论分析散粒噪声；通过选择性加热源区分两种噪声贡献；提出反演方案从噪声累积量重建占据数分布。
AI.result: 能量完全弛豫时散粒噪声被强烈抑制，源自电子堆积到低能态淬灭了部分占据能级的分配噪声；加热源可触发通道间关联噪声的符号反转，揭示隐藏的竞争机制。
AI.conclusion: 建立了耗散手性输运中噪声与占据数分布之间的定量关系，提供了通过噪声测量反演占据数分布的实验可行方案。

title: Strong electron correlations and ligand hybridization for altermagnetism
summary: Spin-band splitting is a hallmark of altermagnetism, intrinsically linked to magnetic ordering driven by electron correlations. However, recent inconsistencies in the detection of altermagnetism in strongly correlated altermagnet candidates have cast doubt on the robustness of this phenomenon and its dependence on many-body effects. Here, using state-of-the-art quantum many-body frameworks, we dissect the electronic origins of altermagnetism in three prototypical candidates: MnF$_2$, MnTe, and RuO$_2$. In MnF$_2$, we identify pronounced local electron correlations within Mn-3$d$ states and uncover a distinct Mott gap in the visible range, rooted in nonlocal screening effects. The strong correlations markedly localize the Mn-3$d$ electrons, leading to a narrowing of the spin-resolved bandwidth and, consequently, a suppression of spin-band splitting. By contrast, MnTe provides an ideal platform for altermagnetism, exhibiting substantial local Mn-3$d$ magnetic moments due to the strong correlations and pronounced spin-band splitting, enabled by robust Mn 3$d$--Te-5$p$ orbital hybridization. RuO$_2$ manifests as a Pauli paramagnet with vanishing local moments, even in its antiferromagnetic phase. Nonetheless, it exhibits significant spin-band splitting, indicative of itinerant altermagnetic behavior. Our results reveal that both strong local electron correlations and judicious ligand selection to promote orbital hybridization are key prerequisites to realizing altermagnetism in strongly correlated systems. These insights pave the way for the rational design and discovery of novel altermagnetic materials.

AI.tldr: 本文通过先进量子多体方法研究三种候选材料中强关联效应与交错磁性的关系，发现MnF₂中强关联抑制自旋带裂分，MnTe是理想交错磁体，RuO₂呈现巡游交错磁性，揭示了强关联和杂化对实现交错磁性的关键作用。
AI.motivation: 近期在强关联交错磁候选材料中检测到不一致结果，对交错磁性的鲁棒性及其对多体效应的依赖性提出质疑，因此需要深入探究电子关联在交错磁性中的起源。
AI.method: 使用最先进的量子多体框架，对MnF₂、MnTe和RuO₂三种候选材料进行电子结构分析，比较其关联强弱、轨道杂化程度及自旋带裂分特征。
AI.result: MnF₂中Mn-3d电子强关联导致带宽窄化、自旋带裂分被抑制；MnTe中强关联与Mn 3d-Te 5p杂化共存，自旋带裂分显著；RuO₂虽局域磁矩消失，但仍有显著自旋带裂分，呈现巡游交错磁性。
AI.conclusion: 强局域电子关联和通过配体选择促进轨道杂化是实现强关联体系中交错磁性的关键前提，为合理设计新型交错磁材料指明了方向。

title: Periodic Behavior of Topology in Graphene with Nanohole Array
comment: 10 pages, 3 figures, 2 tables + Supplementary material (3 pages, 4 tables)
summary: We derive a way to diagnose band topology for graphene with triangular and/or honeycomb array of nanoholes directly from the lattice constant of superstructure $m\sqrt{3}\times m\sqrt{3}$ with integer $m$. Taking into account the $C_{6v}$ crystalline symmetry respected by nanoholes and their array, we demonstrate that nontrivial topology appears periodically with $m$ with period two (six) for triangular (honeycomb) array. These behaviors are verified by Wyckoff positions of Wannier centers and parity index of valence bands at high-symmetry points in Brillouin zone. The results provide a convenient guide for material design of topological electronic states based on graphene derivatives.

AI.tldr: 本文推导了一种直接从超结构晶格常数 $m\sqrt{3}\times m\sqrt{3}$（整数 $m$）诊断石墨烯纳米孔阵列（三角或蜂窝排列）能带拓扑性质的方法，发现拓扑非平凡性随 $m$ 呈周期性变化，为石墨烯衍生物拓扑电子态的材料设计提供了便捷指南。
AI.motivation: 现有的诊断石墨烯纳米孔阵列拓扑性质的方法较为复杂，本文旨在建立一种直接从晶格常数判断拓扑性质的简便方法，便于指导基于石墨烯衍生物的拓扑电子材料设计。
AI.method: 利用纳米孔及其阵列所满足的 $C_{6v}$ 晶体对称性，通过分析Wannier中心的Wyckoff位置以及布里渊区高对称点价带的宇称指数，推导了拓扑性质与超结构晶格常数 $m$ 之间的周期性关系。
AI.result: 三角（蜂窝）阵列的拓扑非平凡性以周期二（六）随 $m$ 周期性出现，并通过Wannier中心Wyckoff位置和价带宇称指数验证了这一规律。
AI.conclusion: 该研究为基于石墨烯衍生物的拓扑电子态材料设计提供了简便实用的指导准则。

title: Uptake of stratospheric species on minerals proposed for stratospheric aerosol injection
summary: Solid mineral-based particles have been proposed as alternatives to sulfates for climate intervention by stratospheric aerosol injection, as a means for improving optical or chemical characteristics and thereby minimize risks and uncertainties. However, the heterogeneous reactivity of solid particles with stratospheric trace gases, and possible implications to the ozone layer, is currently not fully constrained, particularly at stratospheric concentrations. We present a systematic comparative study of the uptake of HNO3, HCl, and NO2 on calcite, alumina, crystalline silica (quartz), and amorphous silica, using complementary Knudsen cell and flow reactor techniques. We find that NO2 uptake is weak on all surfaces, with estimated removal timescales indicating negligible impact on stratospheric nitrogen chemistry. Conversely, HCl uptake is substantial, with a pronounced concentration dependence consistent with surface site limited Langmuir adsorption. Extracting adsorption isotherms, we find that HCl surface coverage at stratospheric concentrations differs by four orders of magnitude between the surfaces, with calcite adsorbing the most and amorphous silica the least, suggesting a dominant role of surface acid-base character. Using HCl surface coverage as a proxy for ClONO2 reactive uptake, we estimate that amorphous silica could deplete substantially less ozone than calcite or alumina under equivalent injection scenarios. We find a marked difference between crystalline and amorphous silica, underscoring the sensitivity of heterogeneous chemistry to surface microstructure and the importance of selecting particles with low-reactivity surfaces in addition to considering bulk characteristics. Our findings motivate the development of particles with surfaces tailored for minimizing SAI risks and uncertainties, including minimal reactivity with stratospheric gases and background sulfate aerosols.

AI.tldr: 本文系统比较了方解石、氧化铝、石英和无定形二氧化硅四种固体颗粒对HNO₃、HCl和NO₂的摄取反应，发现HCl摄取因表面酸碱特性差异显著（方解石最强，无定形二氧化硅最弱），并据此推断无定形二氧化硅在平流层气溶胶注入（SAI）中可能对臭氧消耗影响最小，强调了颗粒表面微观结构在气候干预方案中的重要性。
AI.motivation: 固体矿物颗粒作为平流层气溶胶注入（SAI）中硫酸盐的替代方案，有望改善光学或化学特性以降低风险和不确定性，但目前固体颗粒与平流层痕量气体的非均相反应性，特别是对臭氧层的潜在影响，在平流层实际浓度条件下尚未得到充分约束。
AI.method: 采用克努森池与流动反应器互补技术，系统比较了方解石、氧化铝、石英（结晶二氧化硅）和无定形二氧化硅四种固体表面对HNO₃、HCl和NO₂的摄取行为，并提取吸附等温线分析浓度依赖性。
AI.result: NO₂在所有表面摄取均较弱，对平流层氮化学影响可忽略；HCl摄取显著且具有浓度依赖性（符合Langmuir吸附模型），表面覆盖度在四种材料间相差四个数量级（方解石>氧化铝>石英>无定形二氧化硅），表明表面酸碱特性为主导因素。
AI.conclusion: 以HCl表面覆盖度作为ClONO₂摄取代理指标，无定形二氧化硅在同等注入场景下对臭氧消耗潜力远低于方解石和氧化铝；结晶与无定形二氧化硅间的显著差异揭示了表面微观结构对非均相化学的关键影响，建议SAI颗粒开发应优先选择表面低反应性材料。

title: Depletion-mode N-polar AlN-based high electron mobility transistors with improved on/off ratios
summary: We report N-polar AlN-based high-electron mobility transistors (HEMTs) with a GaN channel thickness of 5.2 nm on N-polar AlN on sapphire. The threshold voltage is around -2.4 to -3.0 V with saturation currents over 240 mA/mm and on/off ratios as high as 10,000, much higher than previously reported N-polar AlN-based HEMTs. The high on/off ratio is attributed to the use of an abrupt AlN/GaN heterostructure with a dedicated AlN transition layer, together with improved gate leakage. The high frequency properties as well as the on-resistance of ~20 Ohm mm are all limited by the 2000 Ohm/square sheet resistance of the channel layer.

AI.tldr: 本文报道了基于N极性AlN的GaN沟道HEMT器件，采用5.2 nm薄沟道和AlN过渡层，实现了高达10,000的开关比和超过240 mA/mm的饱和电流，性能显著优于此前报道的同类器件。
AI.motivation: N极性AlN基HEMT先前性能较差，作者希望通过优化异质结构（引入陡峭AlN/GaN界面和专用AlN过渡层）来提升器件开关比和电流能力。
AI.method: 采用N极性AlN衬底上生长5.2 nm GaN沟道，引入专用的AlN过渡层形成陡峭的AlN/GaN异质结构，并改善栅极漏电。
AI.result: 阈值电压约-2.4至-3.0 V，饱和电流>240 mA/mm，开关比高达10,000，远高于此前报道。但高频性能和导通电阻（~20 Ohm·mm）受限于2000 Ohm/sq的沟道薄层电阻。
AI.conclusion: 通过优化AlN/GaN异质结构可显著提升N极性AlN基HEMT的开关性能，但沟道电阻仍是限制高频和导通特性的瓶颈。

title: A DFT+DMFT study of the electronic structure of Samarium
summary: The electronic structure of Samarium (Sm) was calculated using the density functional theory combined with the single-site dynamical mean-field theory. In this work, we investigated the electronic properties of α, \b{eta} and γ phases at ambient pressure, including the band structures, density of states, self-energy functions and valence state histograms. Our results agree with the experimental data.The calculation shows that the 4f electrons in all these phases are well localized, the Kondo peaks are suppressed and the hybridization between the 4f electrons and conduction electrons are quite weak. Our results also show the strong correlation effect is significant in Sm metal.

AI.tldr: 本文利用密度泛函理论结合单站点动力学平均场理论，计算了金属钐（Sm）在α、β和γ三种相态下的电子结构，发现4f电子高度局域化、近藤峰被抑制、4f电子与传导电子的杂化较弱，且强关联效应显著，计算结果与实验数据吻合良好。
AI.motivation: 钐（Sm）是一种具有强关联电子体系性质的稀土金属，其4f电子的局域化程度及电子结构在不同相态下的变化尚需深入理解。本文旨在通过第一性原理结合动力学平均场理论，系统研究Sm金属在不同相态下的电子性质，以揭示其强关联效应。
AI.method: 采用密度泛函理论（DFT）与单站点动力学平均场理论（DMFT）相结合的方法，计算了Sm在α、β和γ三种相态下的电子结构，分析了能带结构、态密度、自能函数及价态直方图。
AI.result: 计算结果与实验数据吻合；所有相态中4f电子均高度局域化；近藤峰被抑制；4f电子与传导电子之间的杂化较弱；强关联效应在Sm金属中显著存在。
AI.conclusion: DFT+DMFT方法能准确描述Sm金属的强关联电子性质，Sm中4f电子局域性强、杂化弱，属于典型的强关联体系。

title: Spin resolved spectral topology and re-entrant localization in a non Hermitian quasiperiodic SSH chain
summary: We investigate localization and spectral topology in a non Hermitian quasiperiodic Su Schrieffer Heeger lattice with Rashba spin orbit coupling and spin-dependent hopping. By analyzing the inverse participation ratio, complex energy spectrum, and spectral winding numbers, we demonstrate the emergence of a re-entrant transition from extended to localized and back to extended phases as the non-Hermitian parameter increases. The localization transition is accompanied by a simultaneous real-complex-real spectral transition in the complex-energy plane. In the absence of spin dependent hopping, the spectrum forms two nearly spin-degenerate loops characterized by winding numbers w = 2. Upon introducing finite spin-dependent hopping, each loop splits into two independent spin-resolved spectral branches, resulting in four disconnected spectral contours carrying distinct winding sectors. Our results reveal a direct correspondence between localization, spectral topology, and spin-resolved spectral splitting in non-Hermitian quasiperiodic systems.

AI.tldr: 本文研究非厄米准周期Su-Schrieffer-Heeger晶格中（含Rashba自旋轨道耦合和自旋相关跳跃）的局域化与谱拓扑，发现了随非厄米参数增加出现扩展→局域→扩展的重入相变，以及自旋分辨谱分裂导致四个独立谱轮廓的现象。
AI.motivation: 探索非厄米准周期系统中局域化、谱拓扑与自旋分辨谱分裂之间的直接对应关系，揭示重入相变机制。
AI.method: 通过分析逆参与率（IPR）、复能量谱和谱绕数（spectral winding number）来表征局域化与拓扑性质。
AI.result: 发现了重入的扩展→局域→扩展相变，伴随实→复→实谱转换；无自旋依赖跳跃时谱绕数w=2；引入自旋依赖跳跃后谱分裂为四个独立分支，对应不同绕数。
AI.conclusion: 非厄米准周期系统中局域化、谱拓扑与自旋分辨谱分裂之间存在直接对应关系。

title: THEMol dataset: Torsion, Hessian, and Energy of Molecules
summary: We present THEMol (Torsion, Hessian, Energy of Molecules), a massive open-source collection of quantum mechanical properties tailored for closed-shell organic molecules, with up to 50 heavy atoms. THEMol includes a Hessian subset with more than 3 million relaxed geometries with Hessian matrices, a TorsionScan subset with nearly 100 million constrained relaxed geometries with energies and forces, and relaxation-trajectory subsets (HessianRelax and TorsionScanRelax) that together comprise about 3 billion DFT calculations. The chemical space sampling is comprehensive, spanning twelve essential elements and diverse molecular architectures relevant to drug discovery, electrolytes, ionic liquids, and beyond. The dataset also features exhaustive conformational sampling through the TorsionScan and TorsionScanRelax subsets, including comprehensive in-ring and non-ring torsional scans. Furthermore, it contains an extensive library of Hessian matrices, computed at relaxed geometries, to capture critical second-derivative information of the potential energy landscape. Additionally, we supply electron density-derived atomic multipoles computed via the Minimal Basis Iterative Stockholder partition scheme. Organized into five distinct subsets (Hessian, TorsionScan, HessianRelax, TorsionScanRelax, and MBIS), the data encompasses optimized geometries, relaxation trajectories, and derived molecular properties. We anticipate that this massive and diverse dataset will significantly empower the development of highly accurate and transferable molecular potentials.

AI.tldr: THEMol是一个大规模开源量子力学性质数据集，包含500万+松弛几何结构、1亿+扭转扫描构象、30亿+DFT计算，涵盖Hessian矩阵、能量、力和原子多极矩，旨在推动高精度分子势能面开发。
AI.motivation: 现有分子性质数据集在规模、化学空间覆盖度和二阶导数信息（Hessian矩阵）等方面存在不足，难以支撑高精度且可迁移的机器学习分子势能面的训练。
AI.method: 通过DFT计算，系统性地对闭壳有机分子（最多50个重原子）进行松弛几何优化、Hessian矩阵计算、扭转角扫描（含环内和环外）及松弛轨迹记录，并采用MBIS方案计算电子密度衍生的原子多极矩。数据集分为五个子集：Hessian、TorsionScan、HessianRelax、TorsionScanRelax和MBIS。
AI.result: 生成了包含超过300万个松弛几何与Hessian矩阵的Hessian子集、近1亿个约束松弛几何与能量/力的TorsionScan子集，以及总计约30亿次DFT计算的松弛轨迹子集（HessianRelax和TorsionScanRelax）。化学空间覆盖12种必需元素及多种分子架构。
AI.conclusion: THEMol数据集的大规模、多样性和丰富二阶导数信息将显著赋能高精度、可迁移分子势能面的开发，推动药物发现、电解质、离子液体等领域的研究。

title: Ward identities and orbital magnetization in current density functional theory
summary: We revisit the derivation of the orbital magnetization formula for periodic crystals in current density functional theory (CDFT)[1]. Our new derivation computes the linear response of the energy density to a periodic magnetic field in the long-wavelength limit. We unveil a Ward identity which connects the current vertex to the derivative of the Kohn-Sham self-energy. The result of Ref.[1] is confirmed: the orbital magnetization of the interacting solid can be computed exactly (in principle) from the self-consistent eigenfunctions and eigenvalues of the Kohn-Sham equation of CDFT.

AI.tldr: 本文重新推导了周期性晶体中轨道磁化强度的公式，确认了CDFT中可通过Kohn-Sham方程的本征函数和本征值精确计算轨道磁化强度，并揭示了Ward恒等式连接电流顶点与自能导数。
AI.motivation: 重新审视周期晶体在CDFT中轨道磁化强度公式的推导，澄清理论基础并揭示新的物理联系（Ward恒等式）。
AI.method: 通过计算长波极限下能量密度对周期磁场的线性响应，结合Ward恒等式重新推导轨道磁化强度公式。
AI.result: 确认了文献[1]的结果：相互作用固体的轨道磁化强度原则上可由CDFT的Kohn-Sham方程自洽本征函数和本征值精确计算。
AI.conclusion: 为CDFT中轨道磁化强度的计算提供了更严谨的推导路径，并揭示了Ward恒等式这一关键理论联系。

title: On the Symmetries of Anisotropic Spin Interaction Models
comment: Revised in response to the referees' comments
summary: We show that anisotropic spin interactions do not merely break spin-space group (SSG) symmetries, but instead twist them through cohomology invariants, yielding symmetry classes beyond subgroups of $O(3)\times \operatorname{Isom}(\mathbb{R}^3) $. This requires redefining the spin-only group $S_0$ in terms of proper spin rotations.
